历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 3618 → 3333 → 4934 → 3441 → 4316, showing overall large fluctuations. In 2023, due to expansion and changes in the number of examinees, there was a significant backward shift to 4934, rebounding to 3441 in 2024, and then shifting backward again to 4316 in 2025. In the past two years, there has been a trend of backward movement, with the 2025 baseline around 4316. The enrollment plan for Wuhan University in Henan Province for Physics Category was 398 in 2021 → 416 in 2022 → 424 in 2023 → 397 in 2024 → 424 in 2025 → 444 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 20 students (+4.7%), which slightly eases competition, and the ranking numbers tend to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 9th from 2021 to 2024, rose to 8th in 2025, and remained 8th in 2026, firmly among the top universities nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, with 99 events counted (3 positive, 64 negative, 32 neutral), mainly involving school management, campus safety, teacher ethics, etc., which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. On Douyin, it ranks 19th in popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of over 2.6 million, high short video exposure, and still high attention. Wuhan University has a total of 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Law, A+ in Marxist Theory, A+ in Geophysics, A+ in Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, A in Water Resources Engineering, A in Biology, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A in Business Administration, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at Wuhan University continue to be highly recommended. Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other medical majors have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to 907,215 in 2025). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 734,000 Physics Category examinees, with a significant increase in the number of examinees, leading to intensified competition. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan City, Hubei Province, adjacent to Henan Province, with strong regional preference, and Henan candidates have a high willingness to apply. The university has a large enrollment scale in Henan (400+ in Physics Category), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4316, the 2026 expansion of 4.7% (effect of increasing ranking numbers), the significant increase of about 32% in the number of Henan examinees (effect of intensifying competition, decreasing ranking numbers), and the slightly negative school reputation (mild suppression), after offsetting expansion and examinee growth, competition still tends to intensify. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 4358, with a range of 3858–4858.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3858–4858, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Class, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Mathematics, Remote Sensing, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Lei Jun Class, Hongyi Academy) as a sprint. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3858), you can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4858), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 454 → 458 → 396 → 614 → 450 respectively. In 2024, due to batch mergers and other factors, the ranking significantly dropped to 614, rebounding to 450 in 2025, fluctuating within the 400–600 range overall, with a baseline of approximately 450 in 2025. Wuhan University's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province was 99 in 2021 → 92 in 2022 → 85 in 2023 → 79 in 2024 → 96 in 2025 → 117 in 2026, with an increase of 21 students (+21.9%) in 2026 compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, tending to significantly increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, firmly among the top in the country; reputation in 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving campus management-related public opinion, which has relatively limited impact on liberal arts applications; high popularity on Douyin, overall attention to the school remains high; Law A+ (Wuhan University's liberal arts flagship), Marxist Theory A+, Journalism and Communication A-, Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A, Theoretical Economics A-, Applied Economics A-, etc., with outstanding liberal arts strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law continues to be hot and recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (Zhang Xuefeng effect), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics is divided and wait-and-see; the estimated number of history category candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is about 466,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Wuhan is adjacent to Henan, with strong regional preference, and Henan candidates have a high willingness to apply for Wuhan University's liberal arts programs.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 450, the significant enrollment expansion of 21.9% in 2026 (effect of increasing ranking number), the approximately 32% increase in Henan candidates (competition intensification effect), and the sustained popularity of flagship liberal arts majors like Law, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate growth effect. However, to meet fluctuation constraints, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 494, with a range of 435–553.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (within 435), prioritize Law and Hongyi College. If the ranking is near the upper bound (around 553), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Law A+ is Wuhan University's flagship liberal arts program and the most competitive.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年至2025年武汉大学在河南省医学类最低录取位次分别为3427名、3333名、4934名、3441名和26385名。2021-2024年间位次基本稳定在3300-5000名区间，但2025年因新高考 改革（首选物理+再选化学）及护理学专业纳入医学类统计，最低位次骤降至26385名。招生计划方面，2021年32人、2022年41人、2023年49人、2024年31人、2025年56人，2026年 计划为57人，较2025年仅增加1人，扩招幅度约1.79%，对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校。学校综合实力雄厚，医学部拥有多家附属医院，临床医学、口腔医学等专 业在国内享有较高声誉，对河南考生具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。武汉大学位于湖北省武汉市，地理位置优越，交通便利，对河南考生有较强的地域吸引力。202 6年医学类在河南招生57人，招生规模与2025年基本持平，其中护理学计划从11人减至10人，临床医学类高分段专业计划略有增加，整体结构微调。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量历年位次趋势、2026年招生计划微增及专业结构变化，预测2026年武汉大学在河南省医学类最低录取位次约为26268名，较2025年略有上升（位次数字减小），波动区间 预计在25874名至26662名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical category in Henan Province were 3427, 3333, 4934, 3441, and 26385 respectively. Between 2021 and 2024, rankings were generally stable within the 3300-5000 range, but in 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform (first choice: Physics + second choice: Chemistry) and the inclusion of the Nursing major in medical category statistics, the minimum ranking dropped sharply to 26385. In terms of enrollment plans: 32 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 31 in 2024, 56 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 57, an increase of only 1 person compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.79%, which has a limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and is selected as a Double First-Class construction university. The university has strong comprehensive strength, and its medical school has multiple affiliated hospitals. Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology enjoy a high reputation in China, providing sustained attraction to Henan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology facing fierce competition. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan City, Hubei Province, with a superior geographical location and convenient transportation, which has a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. In 2026, the medical category will enroll 57 students in Henan, with the enrollment scale basically the same as in 2025. Among them, the Nursing plan will be reduced from 11 to 10, while the high-scoring segment of Clinical Medicine majors will see a slight increase, with an overall structural adjustment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking trends, the slight increase in the 2026 enrollment plan, and changes in major structure, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical category in Henan Province in 2026 will be approximately 26268, slightly higher than in 2025 (ranking number decreases), with a fluctuation range expected between 25874 and 26662.
